title: Functools, Operator Functions, Caching, and Dispatch
description: Build reusable scoring functions without obscuring cache validity or dispatch behavior. Learners cumulatively produce a measured callable utility and dispatch package through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use partial application to bind stable configuration without hiding required arguments.
Use cache and lru_cache only for hashable inputs with stable effect-free semantics.
Design singledispatch registrations around first-argument type contracts and safe fallbacks.
